description_long: This is a rectangular safety sign with a bold, high-contrast design, featuring the word 'DANGER' in white letters on a red background at the top, and 'DO NOT CLIMB' in black letters on a white background below. The sign is bordered by a thick black outline and has a striped hazard pattern at the bottom, enhancing its visibility and warning effect. The surface appears weathered and slightly dirty, with visible cracks and stains, suggesting outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The back of the sign is plain and gray, showing no text or graphics. The sign is flat and thin, likely made of metal or a durable composite material, suitable for mounting on a wall, fence, or gate. Its design is intended to clearly communicate a prohibition and safety warning in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered rectangular safety sign reading 'DANGER DO NOT CLIMB' with bold text and a striped hazard border, designed for high visibility and outdoor use.
description_view_0: A thin edge view showing the sign's flat, rectangular profile with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_1: The front face of the sign, displaying the 'DANGER DO NOT CLIMB' warning with bold text and hazard stripes, along with visible weathering and stains.
description_view_2: Another thin edge view, identical to view 0, showing only the narrow side of the sign.
description_view_3: The back of the sign, which is plain gray with a cracked texture and no visible markings or text.
attribute_location: fence, wall, or gate in urban or industrial areas
